Valerian officinalis is a flowering plant in the family Valerianaceae, commonly known as valerian. The plant has been used for centuries to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, and improve sleep quality due to its calming effects. Valerian root contains bioactive constituents such as valepotriates, valerenic acid, and isovaleric acid, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with valerian root include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support sleep, relaxation, and overall well-being.
